name: Snail Mucin
description: A powerhouse ingredient that hydrates, repairs damage, and improves skin elasticity.
scientificSummary: Contains a complex mix of glycoproteins, hyaluronic acid, glycolic acid, and copper peptides which together promote skin repair.
mechanismOfAction: Stimulates the production of collagen and elastin while providing a high concentration of nutrients to the skin.

seo.title: Snail Mucin - Repair & Hydration | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover why Snail Mucin is the holy grail for repairing and hydrating your skin.
